info.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
info.privacy.intro: Thank you for using Astra 3D Engine. We take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
info.privacy.collect.title: Information Collection
info.privacy.collect.content: This application runs locally and does not actively collect or upload your personal information to remote servers. Your project files, assets, and other data are stored only on your local device.
info.privacy.storage.title: Local Storage
info.privacy.storage.content: The application uses browser's localStorage and IndexedDB to save your preferences and project snapshots. This data is stored only on your device, and you can clear it anytime in browser settings.
info.privacy.third.title: Third-party Services
info.privacy.third.content: The update checker connects to GitHub API to fetch the latest version information. No personal information is transmitted during this process.
info.privacy.contact.title: Contact Us
info.privacy.contact.content: If you have any privacy-related questions, please contact us via GitHub Issues.
info.update.title: Check for Updates
info.about.title: About
